raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, my card was fraudulently charged {$580.00} and was immediately notified by Citibank. I called and canceled the card and raised a dispute that this is a fraudulent charge. 

The bank closed the case and made me liable. They then took the money out of my debit card which is unacceptable. 

I have tried calling many times to dispute this decision and get the money back asap but it seems next to impossible. 

Its taken 1 month + to get this resolved.
